---
title: "Solar grid power consumption profiles in DRC"
author:
  - name: "Elyse McMillen"
    orcid: "0009-0002-2827-3062"
    email: "elyse.mcmillen@colorado.edu"
    affiliation:
      - name: "University of Colorado Boulder"
        department: "Department of Civil, Environmental and Architectural Engineering"
        city: "Boulder"
        state: "CO"
        country: "USA"
date: "July 02 2026"
format: html
editor: visual
---
